subject: Re: Bones
body:
no no no no no.. no dentals. no greek.. easy, think tangier, formal,, ventian plaster, oyster shell. swirls rather than squares, easy, you are in a bathing suit, you don't want to feel like you've walkd into the breakers, and the waiters have cleared away the tables


----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, August 27, 2007 6:39:40 AM
Subject: Bones

Jeffrey, 
What do you think of this as the BONES for the interior of the Library sitting room? I have been trying to marry a certain greek flavor with the idea of terrace and neoclassical details, remember that all the walls can be mosaic, and the furniture very informal cottony/canvas cushions, etc.This is just the frame... Please advise.J.P.
body_html:
no no no no no.. no dentals. no greek.. easy, think tangier, formal,, ventian plaster, oyster shell. swirls rather than squares, easy, you are in a bathing suit, you don't want to feel like you've walkd into the breakers, and the waiters have cleared away the tables
